name: Luna
description: I was once the scourge of the plains, a terror on the wind. What hope do our enemies think they have? Luna, the Moon Rider Increases total beams and the Eclipse duration. Removes the limit on beams per unit, with the beams appearing twice as fast. Luna may now cast Eclipse on an area, an allied unit, or herself, and have the ability effects follow them.

abilities.name: Lunar Blessing
abilities.description: At nighttime, the Lunar Blessing is Global, and additionally grants Luna bonus night vision. The higher Luna's level, the greater the attack damage bonus and self night vision bonus value. Aura Radius: 1200. Attack Damage Bonus: 1. Self Bonus Factor: 2. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5. Flat Attack Damage Bonus: (25). Aura Radius: Global Self.

abilities.name: Lucent Beam
abilities.description: Calls a beam of lunar energy down upon an enemy, damaging and briefly stunning them. Cast Range: 800. Number of Targets: 1 (2). Damage: 75/150/225/300 (155/230/305/380). Stun Duration: 0.6 (1.1). Secondary Target Search Radius: 500. Cooldown: 9/8/7/6. Mana Cost: 90/100/110/120.

abilities.name: Lunar Orbit
abilities.description: Luna's glaive spirals out, rotates around her, and instantly attacks collided enemy units for a portion of her attack damage. Grants bonus movement speed and increases damage reduction while active. Orbit Radius: 225. Number of Glaives: 4 (5). Orbital Speed: 160 (240). Collision Radius: 200. Instant Attack Factor: 0.28/0.32/0.36/0.4 (0.42/0.48/0.54/0.6). Duration: 5/6/7/8. Cooldown: 40/35/30/25. Mana Cost: 65/70/75/80.

abilities.name: Moon Glaives
abilities.description: Luna's attacks bounce between enemy units, and deals lesser damage per bounce. Search Radius: 500. Number of Bounces: 3/4/5/6. Bounce Speed: 900. Damage Factor per Bounce: 0.5/0.55/0.6/0.65 (0.55/0.6/0.65/0.7).

abilities.name: Eclipse
abilities.description: These lucent strikes are of the corresponding level of Lucent Beam. The beams do not stun their target. Search Radius: 675. Number of Beams: 6/9/12 (6/12/18). Beam Interval: 0.6 (0.3). Eclipse Duration: 2.4/4.2/6 (1.8/3.6/5.4). Set Nighttime Duration: 10. Damage Factor: 1. Cooldown: 150/200/250.
